20: // CreateCredentialStoreStaticApi uses the Go api to create a new static credential store.
21: // Returns the id of the new credential store
22: func CreateCredentialStoreStaticApi(t testing.TB, ctx context.Context, client *api.Client, projectId string) (string, error) {
23: 	name, err := base62.Random(16)
24: 	if err != nil {
25: 		return "", err
26: 	}
27: 
28: 	csClient := credentialstores.NewClient(client)
29: 	newCredentialStoreResult, err := csClient.Create(
30: 		ctx,
31: 		"static",
32: 		projectId,
33: 		credentialstores.WithName(fmt.Sprintf("e2e Credential Store %s", name)),
34: 	)
35: 	if err != nil {
36: 		return "", err
37: 	}
38: 
39: 	credentialStoreId := newCredentialStoreResult.Item.Id
40: 	t.Logf("Created Credential Store: %s", credentialStoreId)
41: 	return credentialStoreId, nil
42: }
43: 
44: // CreateCredentialStoreVaultApi uses the API to create a Vault credential store
45: // Returns the id of the new credential store
46: func CreateCredentialStoreVaultApi(t testing.TB, ctx context.Context, client *api.Client, projectId string, vaultAddr string, vaultToken string) (string, error) {
47: 	name, err := base62.Random(16)
48: 	if err != nil {
49: 		return "", err
50: 	}
51: 
52: 	c := credentialstores.NewClient(client)
53: 	newCredentialStoreResult, err := c.Create(
54: 		ctx, "vault", projectId,
55: 		credentialstores.WithName("e2e Credential Store"),
56: 		credentialstores.WithVaultCredentialStoreAddress(vaultAddr),
57: 		credentialstores.WithVaultCredentialStoreToken(vaultToken),
58: 		credentialstores.WithName(fmt.Sprintf("e2e Credential Store %s", name)),
59: 	)
60: 	if err != nil {
61: 		return "", err
62: 	}
63: 
64: 	credentialStoreId := newCredentialStoreResult.Item.Id
65: 	t.Logf("Created Credential Store: %s", credentialStoreId)
66: 	return credentialStoreId, nil
67: }

69: // CreateCredentialStoreVaultCli uses the cli to create a Vault credential store
70: // Returns the id of the new credential store
71: func CreateCredentialStoreVaultCli(t testing.TB, ctx context.Context, projectId string, vaultAddr string, vaultToken string) (string, error) {
72: 	name, err := base62.Random(16)
73: 	if err != nil {
74: 		return "", err
75: 	}
76: 
77: 	output := e2e.RunCommand(ctx, "boundary",
78: 		e2e.WithArgs(
79: 			"credential-stores", "create", "vault",
80: 			"-scope-id", projectId,
81: 			"-vault-address", vaultAddr,
82: 			"-vault-token", vaultToken,
83: 			"-name", fmt.Sprintf("e2e Credential Store %s", name),
84: 			"-description", "e2e",
85: 			"-format", "json",
86: 		),
87: 	)
88: 	if output.Err != nil {
89: 		return "", fmt.Errorf("%w: %s", output.Err, string(output.Stderr))
90: 	}
91: 
92: 	var createCredentialStoreResult credentialstores.CredentialStoreCreateResult
93: 	err = json.Unmarshal(output.Stdout, &createCredentialStoreResult)
94: 	if err != nil {
95: 		return "", err
96: 	}
97: 
98: 	credentialStoreId := createCredentialStoreResult.Item.Id
99: 	t.Logf("Created Credential Store: %s", credentialStoreId)
100: 	return credentialStoreId, nil
101: }

170: // CreateStaticCredentialPrivateKeyCli uses the cli to create a new private key credential in the
171: // provided static credential store.
172: // Returns the id of the new credential
173: func CreateStaticCredentialPrivateKeyCli(t testing.TB, ctx context.Context, credentialStoreId string, user string, filePath string) (string, error) {
174: 	name, err := base62.Random(16)
175: 	if err != nil {
176: 		return "", err
177: 	}
178: 
179: 	output := e2e.RunCommand(ctx, "boundary",
180: 		e2e.WithArgs(
181: 			"credentials", "create", "ssh-private-key",
182: 			"-credential-store-id", credentialStoreId,
183: 			"-username", user,
184: 			"-private-key", "file://"+filePath,
185: 			"-name", fmt.Sprintf("e2e Credential %s", name),
186: 			"-description", "e2e",
187: 			"-format", "json",
188: 		),
189: 	)

191: 		return "", fmt.Errorf("%w: %s", output.Err, string(output.Stderr))
192: 	}
193: 
194: 	var createCredentialResult credentials.CredentialCreateResult
195: 	err = json.Unmarshal(output.Stdout, &createCredentialResult)
196: 	if err != nil {
197: 		return "", err
198: 	}
199: 
200: 	credentialId := createCredentialResult.Item.Id
201: 	t.Logf("Created SSH Private Key Credentials: %s", credentialId)
202: 	return credentialId, nil
203: }
